title: MESE Ore
description: This mod adds a MESE Ore from Minetest
body:
This mod adds MESE ore from [Minetest](https://www.minetest.net). I'm use a Minetest textures, and create a MESE stuff
Mod ads a MESE crystal fragment, MESE tools, MESE Block, MESE Ore (also Deepslate version)
You can craft a MESE Lamp, MESE Armor, MESE Block and etc.
You can mine a MESE ore on common or deepslate version, and if you have 64 MESE crystal fragments, you complete a challenge called "MESE King"

FAQ
==
Q: Can i'm make addon for this mod?
A: Yes, you can

Q: Can i'm use a mod for my modpacks?
A: Yes, of course, you can use this mod for modpacks
